tweets.text:
//Actual BORDER SECURITY//

MSG (US Army ret) Jack Dona: 
Sheriff Dannels - we had our Cochise County GOP Friday luncheon today. Lots of comments about how safe you are keeping us! I made sure to let people know about the announcement on Operation Safe Street 2, and how you are protecting us from the chaos. A resident from the Dragoon Mountains asked me many questions. I told him to look around; Cochise County is still safe. That's thanks to the Sheriff Dannels’ new plan! Are any other sheriffs nationwide are reaching out? Our team has been pushing for citizens to reach out to their sheriffs to ask them about the "Dannels Plan to Secure Our Border”.

Sheriff Mark Dannels: 
Hello Jack - On behalf of the men and women who wear the badge, thank you for your kindness and support! 
As we both know in a time when criticism is rampant, it’s nice to hear!  
I talk to sheriffs a lot. On 11 Nov, eight major city police chiefs will witness our operation and the week after, sheriffs are coming from the Midwest. We’re definitely making a measurable statement! Plus, I've heard 3 times this week from the White House; apparently we are making some noise there!  Will keep you posted on that, too. Thank you.

MSG Jack Dona: 
Thank you, sir. Nice to see an Army veteran like you keeping your oath to our Constitution! You and other veterans like Sheriff Leon Wilmot of Yuma County AZ are going to save our Republic! 

Sheriff Mark Dannels: 
That's what makes serving in this county special - veteran supported - as WE truly share America's values!
https://t.co/AkPfs1syud

Arizona Senator. Conservative America First Pro-Trump Republican in #LD7. 
Air Force pilot, biz entrepreneur, homeschool mom. #MAGA #AmericaFirst 🇺🇸🦅
